docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, SARAH ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WRIGHT, SARAH ,AN INDIVIDUAL $21,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
